title: Sweet Betrayal
relevance_summary: Governance proposal with flash-loaned votes on DAO

prevention.rule: Block any tx that transfers large amounts of tokens to new wallets shortly before a governance proposal.
prevention.trigger: large token transfer -> new wallet -> governance proposal within 24 hours

red_flags: Large token transfers to new wallets
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that transfers large amounts of tokens to new wallets shortly before a governance proposal.
summary: A mysterious wallet locked a large amount of CAKE and transferred it to new addresses just before a governance proposal aimed at removing veCAKE. This allowed the new wallets to become a decisive voting bloc, potentially undermining the governance system.
